ACE Parkway 2.0 —
Noida's Premium Address

ACE Parkway 2.0 is an ultra-premium residential development set across 15 lush acres in Sector 150, Noida — the city's greenest and most planned sector. Designed for those who demand the finest, it features 11 iconic towers with 790+ residences crafted for a life beyond ordinary.

With 80% open green landscape, a 1 lakh+ sq ft world-class clubhouse, and seamless connectivity to the Noida–Greater Noida Expressway, ACE Parkway 2.0 redefines what it means to live at the top in Noida.

15 Acres of land
11 Premium towers
790+ Exclusive residences
80% Open green space
FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the starting price of ACE Parkway 2.0? +
The pre-launch BSP starts at ₹16,995/sq ft. The 3 BHK (1,900 sq ft) starts at ₹3.23 Cr*. Prices exclude PLC, club charges, parking, taxes, OC and registration. Contact us for the complete price list.
Where is ACE Parkway 2.0 located? +
ACE Parkway 2.0 is located in Sector 150, Noida — just 5 minutes from the Yamuna Expressway and approximately 25 minutes from the upcoming Jewar International Airport. It has direct access to the Noida–Greater Noida Expressway.
What configurations are available? +
ACE Parkway 2.0 offers 3 BHK (1,900 sq ft at ₹3.23 Cr*), 4 BHK (2,600 sq ft at ₹4.42 Cr*), and 4 BHK Large (4,200 sq ft at ₹7.14 Cr*). 5 BHK options are also planned for the project.
How much can I save at pre-launch? +
Pre-launch BSP is ₹16,995/sq ft vs launch BSP of ₹21,995/sq ft — a saving of ₹5,000/sq ft. You save ₹95 Lakh* on 3 BHK, ₹1.30 Cr* on 4 BHK, and up to ₹2.10 Cr* on the 4 BHK Large (4,200 sq ft).
What are the amenities at ACE Parkway 2.0? +
The project features a grand 1 lakh+ sq ft clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, kids' play zone, sports courts, landscaped greens, café & lounge, party lounge, indoor games, meditation zone, car parking, and 24×7 security.
Who is the developer? +
ACE Parkway 2.0 is developed by ACE Group, one of NCR's most trusted premium real estate developers with over a decade of experience delivering high-quality residential projects across Noida and Greater Noida.
What is the total project size? +
ACE Parkway 2.0 spans 15 acres with 11 towers (G+21 to G+25), approximately 790–900 exclusive units, and 80% open green landscape. It is a low-density premium development.
How far is it from Jewar Airport? +
ACE Parkway 2.0 is approximately 25 minutes from the upcoming Noida International Airport (Jewar), making it an excellent long-term investment with strong appreciation potential driven by airport-related infrastructure growth.
